task_description: Build headless WordPress Astro site herbertokolowitz.com
reflection_q1: Should have extracted Language type and SUPPORTED_LOCALES constant from the start — the getStaticPaths sync trap was predictable
reflection_q2: Front-load a shared i18n constants file for any multilingual project; generate shared layout components to avoid index.astro duplication
reflection_q3: Council skill in THINK phase would have been valuable for debating WP URL/API strategy; FirstPrinciples for the i18n architecture

task_description: Archive Astro branch, restore clean static main
reflection_q1: The manual git checkout -- revert step was unnecessary — switching branches auto-restores tracked files. Could have skipped 3 planned commands.
reflection_q2: Test SSH auth earlier (THINK phase as prerequisite) rather than BUILD. Would catch auth issues before any destructive work begins.
reflection_q3: No capabilities were needed here; this was pure git operations. Correct call to skip capability selection for a plan-execution-only task.

task_description: Implement ATOM Obsidian second brain integration
reflection_q1: Could have used prd-utils.ts exports for findLatestPRD and parseFrontmatter — chose self-contained standalone script instead to avoid cross-directory coupling
reflection_q2: Running /simplify mid-EXECUTE rather than post-EXECUTE would catch import and efficiency issues earlier, reducing rework
reflection_q3: prd-utils.ts already had all the PRD parsing I needed — should scan hooks/lib/ for reusable utilities at the start of any tool-writing task

task_description: Add Noller AI Zotero PDFs to NotebookLM
reflection_q1: Could have run test upload earlier to validate auth before full OBSERVE. Worked fine but an early smoke test would be cleaner.
reflection_q2: A smarter algorithm would pre-validate the notebooklm library version compatibility (sources bug with s.type) before trusting the CLI verify step.
reflection_q3: No additional capabilities needed for this task — it was purely mechanical upload work. NotebookLM skill was the right sole capability.
